top_signals.title: Strait of Hormuz ‘closed’ as Iran and US exchange strikes
top_signals.summary: Iran has declared the Strait of Hormuz closed as it trades fresh strikes with the US over the alleged unauthorised passage of a ship through the vital trade route. The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps said on Sunday morning that the waterway, which usually accounts for a quarter of the world’s maritime oil trade, will be [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
